userMessage: I'm testing a TI MSPM0 microcontroller running at 32MHz. Set up a complete protocol validation flow: configure UART on B1 CH1 115200 8N1 and trigger on a start bit, then on B2 configure I2C CH2 clock CH3 data at 400kHz fast mode and trigger on address 0x50 read, then on B3 configure SPI CH4 clock MOSI CH1 MISO CH2 CS CH3 active low and trigger on SS. Run single sequence for each bus, save a screenshot per test, add frequency measurement on CH1 to verify the 32MHz clock, query the result, then error check and disconnect.
